name: Entra Accounts Never Used After Provisioning
description: Detects active entra accounts older than 30 days with no successful login recorded.
query: SELECT u.id AS id, u.display_name AS account_name, u.created_datetime AS created_at FROM entra_users u WHERE COALESCE(u.account_enabled, true) = true AND u.last_sign_in_datetime IS NULL AND u.created_datetime < NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'
remediation: Remove or disable unused accounts and confirm provisioning flows are not creating unnecessary access.
